message:
fix(storage): replace prepare(INSERT) with execute_with_params

fsqlite's prepare() only supports SELECT statements. Replaced three
instances of conn.prepare("INSERT ...") in rebuild_blocked_cache_impl
and set_export_hashes with conn.execute_with_params() loops. This
fixes 13 test failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
